'''Kian'thar''' was the native [[Language/Legends|language]] of the [[Kian'thar]] [[Species/Legends|species]] from [[Shaum Hii/Legends|Shaum Hii]]. Most Kian'thar were fluent in both Kian'thar and [[Galactic Basic Standard/Legends|Basic]], although only literate in their own language.<ref name="Ultimate Alien Anthology" />

Kian'thar used mainly croaks, honks and [[Water/Legends|watery]] bubbling sounds. Its written form used short phrases and a simple alphabet.<ref name="Ultimate Alien Anthology" />

{{Language-stub}}
